semanticCore: Neglect, leaving alone without purpose, shepherdless camels, or vanity

keyDerivations.meaning: Neglected, left alone without purpose, shepherdless, or useless

figurativeOrRareUsages: أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنْسَانُ أَنْ يُتْرَكَ سُدًى (75:36): Does man think that he will be left neglected/without purpose (without accountability or resurrection)?
summaryEn: The root represents being neglected or left without purpose (Sudan), refuting the human assumption that one can live without moral commands or face no resurrection.
summaryAr: يمثل هذا الجذر الترك والإهمال بغير فائدة كالماشية تترك بلا راع سدى (سدي)، سائلاً الإنسان مستنكراً ظنه أنه سيعفى من الحساب والبعث (أن يترك سدى).
rawText: سدى A bag, or other receptacle, for travellingprovisions or for goods or utensils &c.; syn. وِعَآءٌ. (K.)
